title: Loop Earplugs (Including Their Limited-Edition Coachella Set) Continue to Be a Festival Essential This Season
summary: Coachella wants you to go front row without bursting your eardrums. The leading earplug company Loop has returned as the official partner of Goldenvoice’s famed music festival following the sold-out success of their debut partnership in 2025. Like last year, they’ve released limited-edition Loop x …
